benefits.description: Losing consistently on 5mg dose after stalling on 10mg. Lost 5 pounds after dose reduction.

side_effects.description: Increased heart rate correlated with higher dose (10mg)
At 10mg dose, not experiencing appetite suppression and reaching for snacks and candy more often

protocol_notes: Previously on 10mg for 2 months with weight loss plateau of 2-3 pounds. Reduced to 5mg and experienced consistent fat loss. User attributes higher dose stress to increased cortisol/stress response leading to increased snacking behavior. Same vendor used throughout protocol.
